name: Fermi Inc.
summary: Overview Fermi Inc. (Fermi, we, us, or our) exists to power the artificial intelligence needs of tomorrow. We are building a private power campus for AI-centric customersdeveloping and leasing large-scale, grid-independent energy generation and high-performance computing facilities purpose-built for the hyperscale era.
